heading: Notice of action on application
label: 2201 Notice of action on application
notes: Amendments1988— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section read as follows: “Every applicant for a loan from an institution of the System shall be entitled to prompt written notice of action on his application, and, if the loan applied for is reduced or denied, the reason for such action, and of the applicant’s right to review under .”Pub. L. 100–233section 2202 of this title1985—, provided for a “written” notice and for the applicant’s right to review under .Pub. L. 99–205, § 302section 2202 of this title
Effective Date of 1985 AmendmentAmendment by effective thirty days after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 99–205section 401 of Pub. L. 99–205section 2001 of this titleDec. 23, 1985
